title: Klarna shifts engineers and marketers into customer support after aggressive AI cuts
description: Klarna is reassigning engineers and marketing staff to customer-support roles via an internal talent pool after its CEO acknowledged that earlier AI-driven cost-cutting went too far. The buy-now, pay-later company, which has eliminated more than 1,200 external SaaS tools and restructured teams, is now facing the reality that overreliance on AI for efficiency can create unintended consequences for both operations and employees.
